title: neolepia
intro: Neolepia is a plant species that belongs to the fern family and is native to New Zealand. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Research has shown that Neolepia has potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases. Neolepia can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
